displayNameZh: 让大家知道你正在持续稳定输出
summary: Yt Consistent Output component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「让大家知道你正在持续稳定输出」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-consistent-output/src/YtConsistentOutput.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtConsistentOutput` and `ytConsistentOutputDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Consistent Output Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-consistent-output to my project. Preserve the exported YtConsistentOutputProps API and register the YtConsistentOutput composition with the default props.
